snippet.title: "Andy (Such a Fine Mayor!) - Marsh Family parody of Looking Glass's "Brandy" on Burnham vs Starmer
snippet.description:
Given this had to be a super-rapid turnaround to get out on the day of Starmer’s resignation (and it's a school night, with no boys around), it was great to discover that the girls were well up to speed with Looking Glass’s 1972 belter “Brandy (Such a Fine Girl)” – on account of it apparently featuring in a Guardians of the Galaxy movie, which do tend to have great retro soundtracks. 

So here’s our spin on the track with the title name switched to Andy – for Andy Burnham, the recent mayor of Manchester, whose securing of a Parliamentary seat via a by-election win last Thursday ensured the nail in the coffin for Keir Starmer’s limping tenure as the British Prime Minister. We share many people’s slight dismay that our countryfolk are once again rushing through leaders, and there’s a a sense of unease at what is to follow. Starmer ran out of road and support in the Labour Party, especially after a thumping in the local elections, but was also dealt a hard hand by the press, and perhaps no one is immune to the pattern of trial by popular opinion and newscycle, and it's now an impossible job. We'll see what Burnham has to offer!

You can get up to speed if you need to here: https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/live/ckger03mrl0t

___________________________ 

Order our new album "Hollow Chapters" (came out 27 March): 
DIGITAL: https://orcd.co/hollowchapters 
PHYSICAL: CDs or LPs: https://themarshfamily.bandcamp.com/album/hollow-chapters

___________________________ 

Support us here: 
- PayPal to leave us a tip jar: https://paypal.me/marshfamilysongs 
- Patreon for ongoing support & bonuses: https://www.patreon.com/marshfamilysongs 

Find our other channels here: https://linktr.ee/marshfamilysongs 

Follow us here: 
- https://www.marshfamilysongs.com 
- https://www.facebook.com/MarshFamilySongs/ 
- https://www.instagram.com/marshfamilysongs/ 
- https://twitter.com/MarshSongs 
- https://www.threads.net/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://www.tiktok.com/@marshfamilysongs 
- https://bsky.app/profile/marshfamilysongs.bsky.social 
- https://open.spotify.com/artist/6AYmbCwi92V29y69lkRkRa 

___________________________ 

LYRICS

There’s reports comin’ out today
And we learn someone has got his way
Keir Starmer has resigned they say
He’s walking out his home

What kind of world have we got to now?
When every jerk brings a curtain down
They say: “Andy, bet he’ll stick around”
But there’s a twist every time

Oh Labour say: “Andy, you’re a fine mayor!” (You’re a fine mayor)
“Now you’ve stood as an MP” (Such a fine mayor)
You’re the guy to steal our failed majority

Andy wears his T shirts plain
Tongue that’s kinda silver, from the North he came
A jacket, to hide a frame
Up in Manchester they loved

He came on a summer’s day
Forcin’ rifts from far away
Then he said to Keir - he couldn’t stay
Now Starmer’s had to go

Oh Labour said: “Andy, you’re a fine mayor!” (You’re a fine mayor)
“What a half-life you could lead!” (Such a fine mayor)
But we’ll knife you down when our targets aren’t achieved

Yeah, Andy needs to watch his ass when it all goes jackanory
Cos the media love the fall not rise
Been gorgin’ on this story
Well Keir may well have hit his roof
But he was an honest man
Does Andy have a mandate or a plan?

Like a child, when they want ice cream
Now the style is just to cry and scream
And it began back in 2016
As Brexit paved the way

We hear them say “Andy, you’re the answer!” (You’re the answer)
“What a good guy - you can lead!” (You’re the answer)
But the tide is out and the country’s on its knees

Andy, the exciter (the exciter)
What a dogfight we have seen (such a dogfight)
Is he saviour or Labour dopamine?



___________________________ 

THANKS SO MUCH TO PATREONS (HOWLERS below):

Jeremy Sedgley,  
John Hanger,  
Stephen Shuttleworth,  
Sacramento Scott,  
Christian Schranz,  
Peter Green,  
Richard Boutbee,  
LisaMarie Fitzpatrick,  
Ed Rocheck,  
Wolfgang Tampier,  
Dan McColm,  
Douglas Lind,  
David Ryan,  
Simon Haslam,  
Lew,  
Mike Smith,  
Andy Riches,  
Cliff Hope,  
Carol Leff,  
Geeta & Karen (Alyssa Sangeeta Jacobson Memorial), 
David Patrao, 
Grandad

snippet.title: KLARA AND THE SUN – Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
Meet Klara. Your new best (artificial) friend. 🌞

Jenna Ortega is Klara in Director Taika Waititi’s adaptation of Kazuo Ishiguro’s #KlaraAndTheSun - coming exclusively to theatres October 23. Watch the trailer now.

KLARA AND THE SUN

Comedy/Drama

October 23, 2026
Based on the bestselling novel from Nobel Prize-winner Kazuo Ishiguro and written and directed by Academy-Award® winner Taika Waititi (Jojo Rabbit), Klara and the Sun introduces audiences to Klara (Jenna Ortega), an Artificial Friend who wants nothing more than to find the perfect home. When Klara meets Josie (Mia Tharia), each immediately senses a kindred spirit in the other. Josie has a fraught relationship with her mother (Amy Adams) and they’ve suffered great loss, but Klara’s innocent wonder and unwavering loyalty begin to heal the family and bring light to Josie’s complicated world.
 
Directed by:​​​​​
Taika Waititi
 
Screenplay by:​​​​
Taika Waititi and Dahvi Waller
 
Based on the book by:​​​
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Produced by: ​​​​​
David Heyman, p.g.a.
Garrett Basch, p.g.a.
Taika Waititi, p.g.a.
 
Executive Producers:​​​​
Gary Barber
​​​​​​Alex G. Scott
​​​​​​Jeffrey Clifford
Rosie Alison
Kazuo Ishiguro
 
Cast: ​​​​​​
Jenna Ortega
​​​​​​Amy Adams
Mia Tharia
Aran Murphy​
with Steve Buscemi
and Natasha Lyonne
 
This film is rated PG-13 by The Motion Picture Association for the following reasons: thematic elements, some violence and strong language.

snippet.title: World War Z 2: THE CURE – First Trailer | Brad Pitt, Mads Mikkelsen, Elle Fanning | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#WorldWarZ2 #BradPitt  #ElleFanning 

Ten years after the zombie war ended, humanity has rebuilt behind massive quarantine walls. Gerry Lane is living a quiet life in Norway, but everything changes when the virus mutates into a faster, smarter, and deadlier strain. After Spain, Italy, and Greece fall in a single night, Gerry is called back for one final mission.

WHO virologist Dr. Kwame Asante discovers that frozen samples from Patient Zero may still exist inside an abandoned underground laboratory in the Congo. Gerry and a small strike team enter the world’s most infected zone to recover the samples, but the mission awakens thousands of hibernating zombies.

The survivors escape to Iceland, humanity’s last safe zone, where Colonel Ava Renner prepares for the final battle. As a massive horde crosses the ice, Gerry races to release an airborne cure before the fortress falls. The cure works, but one infected woman named Ellie survives—and her transformed DNA may hold the secret to a permanent vaccine.

Starring Brad Pitt, Mads Mikkelsen, Viola Davis, and Elle Fanning.

snippet.title: Valve Steam Machine Review: GPU & CPU Benchmarks, SteamOS Test, Thermals, Noise, and Price
snippet.description:

The Valve Steam Machine runs desktop SteamOS, a Linux distribution, and ships in a console-like form factor with the intent for use as a living room PC or mini PC. The Machine ships at $1050 for a 512GB model and $1350 for a 2TB model, so we have DIY PC price comparisons included. Our testing of the Steam Machine benchmarks gaming performance, GPU performance, framerate (FPS), CPU performance, compression and decompression, thermals, acoustics, and more. We also look at SteamOS in-depth and at BIOS, power draw, and more in our in-depth Steam Machine review.

snippet.title: Steam Machine Review: Valve's New Console/PC Hybrid
snippet.description:
The Steam Machine is Valve's new piece of hardware entering the scene as a mini PC built for living room gaming. We love a lot about it, had some issues with it, but overall came away from our time with it feeling very positive. 

The big question mark has been around the Steam Machine price. After the Steam Deck had a jump in price, we knew that would be a major factor in who to recommend this to for PC gaming. The Steam Machine specs in coordination with how well it works with the Steam Controller being still make this an appealing PC rig to consider. 

For all things Valve and Steam related, keep it locked to IGN

The big question mark has been around the Steam Machine price. After the Steam Deck had a jump in price, we knew that would be a major factor in who to recommend this to for PC gaming. The Steam Machine specs in coordination with how well it works with the Steam Controller being still make this an appealing PC rig to consider. 

For all things Valve and Steam related, keep it locked to IGN

snippet.title: KLARA AND THE SUN Official Trailer (2026) Jenna Ortega
snippet.description:
Official Klara and the Sun Movie Trailer 2026 | More ➤ https://KinoCheck.com/App | Jenna Ortega Movie Trailer | Cinema: 23 Oct 2026 | Details ➤ https://KinoCheck.com/movie/bjs/klara-and-the-sun-2026?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description
Klara, an Artificial Friend designed to prevent loneliness, is purchased by a mother and her bright teen daughter, Josie. Josie, who suffers from a mysterious illness, adores her new robot companion. Allah....The One who never leaves, never forgets and never breaks His promise.

When people disappoint us, when trust is broken and when the weight of this dunya feels too heavy to carry, there is always One we can turn back to. Allah is the One who hears every silent prayer, sees every hidden tear and opens His door no matter how far we've wandered.

Save Me is a reminder that true peace isn't found in relying on people, it's found in relying on Allah alone. The One whose mercy elevates us, whose guidance brings us home and whose love remains when everything else fades.
